SEARCH
Package com.dropbox.core.v2.auth

Class AccessError

java.lang.Object
com.dropbox.core.v2.auth.AccessError
public final class AccessError extends Object
Error occurred because the account doesn't have permission to access the resource.

This class is an open tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isAbc() methods will return true. You can use tag() to determine the tag associated with this instance.

Open unions may be extended in the future with additional tags. If a new tag is introduced that this SDK does not recognized, the OTHER value will be used.

  • Field Details

    • TEAM_ACCESS_DENIED

      public static final AccessError TEAM_ACCESS_DENIED
      Team doesn't have permission to access.

    • OTHER

      public static final AccessError OTHER
      Catch-all used for unknown tag values returned by the Dropbox servers.

      Receiving a catch-all value typically indicates this SDK version is not up to date. Consider updating your SDK version to handle the new tags.

  • Method Details

    • tag

      public AccessError.Tag tag()
      Returns the tag for this instance.

      This class is a tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isXyz() methods will return true. Callers are recommended to use the tag value in a switch statement to properly handle the different values for this AccessError.

      If a tag returned by the server is unrecognized by this SDK, the AccessError.Tag.OTHER value will be used.

      Returns:
      the tag for this instance.

    • isInvalidAccountType

      public boolean isInvalidAccountType()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag AccessError.Tag.INVALID_ACCOUNT_TYPE, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as AccessError.Tag.INVALID_ACCOUNT_TYPE, false otherwise.

    • invalidAccountType

      public static AccessError invalidAccountType(InvalidAccountTypeError value)
      Returns an instance of AccessError that has its tag set to AccessError.Tag.INVALID_ACCOUNT_TYPE.

      Current account type cannot access the resource.

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of AccessError with its tag set to AccessError.Tag.INVALID_ACCOUNT_TYPE.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getInvalidAccountTypeValue

      public InvalidAccountTypeError getInvalidAccountTypeValue()
      Current account type cannot access the resource.

      This instance must be tagged as AccessError.Tag.INVALID_ACCOUNT_TYPE.

      Returns:
      The InvalidAccountTypeError value associated with this instance if isInvalidAccountType() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isInvalidAccountType() is false.

    • isPaperAccessDenied

      public boolean isPaperAccessDenied()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag AccessError.Tag.PAPER_ACCESS_DENIED, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as AccessError.Tag.PAPER_ACCESS_DENIED, false otherwise.

    • paperAccessDenied

      public static AccessError paperAccessDenied(PaperAccessError value)
      Returns an instance of AccessError that has its tag set to AccessError.Tag.PAPER_ACCESS_DENIED.

      Current account cannot access Paper.

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of AccessError with its tag set to AccessError.Tag.PAPER_ACCESS_DENIED.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getPaperAccessDeniedValue

      public PaperAccessError getPaperAccessDeniedValue()
      Current account cannot access Paper.

      This instance must be tagged as AccessError.Tag.PAPER_ACCESS_DENIED.

      Returns:
      The PaperAccessError value associated with this instance if isPaperAccessDenied() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isPaperAccessDenied() is false.

    • isTeamAccessDenied

      public boolean isTeamAccessDenied()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag AccessError.Tag.TEAM_ACCESS_DENIED, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as AccessError.Tag.TEAM_ACCESS_DENIED, false otherwise.

    • isNoPermission

      public boolean isNoPermission()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag AccessError.Tag.NO_PERMISSION, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as AccessError.Tag.NO_PERMISSION, false otherwise.

    • noPermission

      public static AccessError noPermission(NoPermissionError value)
      Returns an instance of AccessError that has its tag set to AccessError.Tag.NO_PERMISSION.

      Caller does not have permission to access the resource.

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of AccessError with its tag set to AccessError.Tag.NO_PERMISSION.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is null.

    • getNoPermissionValue

      public NoPermissionError getNoPermissionValue()
      Caller does not have permission to access the resource.

      This instance must be tagged as AccessError.Tag.NO_PERMISSION.

      Returns:
      The NoPermissionError value associated with this instance if isNoPermission() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isNoPermission() is false.

    • isOther

      public boolean isOther()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag AccessError.Tag.OTHER, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as AccessError.Tag.OTHER, false otherwise.
